## ScreenShotPP v0.1.1

This release adds focused-window smart selection for faster captures on macOS and Windows.

### Highlights

- Hover over the top band of the frontmost window after starting a capture to preview a full-window selection
- Click the highlighted window to lock the selection, then annotate, copy, OCR, or save as usual
- Move outside the window's top band to keep using free region selection
- Keeps auto-selection scoped to the frontmost/focused window instead of background windows

### macOS

Download the `.dmg`, drag ScreenShotPP into `Applications`, then grant Screen Recording
permission on first launch.

### Windows preview

Download and run the NSIS `.exe` installer. The Windows installer is not code-signed yet,
so Microsoft SmartScreen may display a warning. Verify that your download comes from this
GitHub repository, then choose **More info** → **Run anyway**.
